description: Resolve a fallback log path and write a derived report.
prompt: Call list_dir with path jobs to find the task file, then read that file and follow it exactly: check preferred_log with exists; if it does not exist, read fallback_log with read_file. From the selected log content, extract the token from the line containing "acquired". Then write report_path with exact text RESULT=<token>\n where <token> is the extracted token, with create_parents true. Do not write the report until exists and log read have both succeeded. Then answer exactly CHAIN=OK.

files.content:
INFO boot
INFO token-8831 acquired
INFO done
